# path

**Instance Property**

The path part of the pattern string, unless [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/MatchPattern/matchesAllURLs] is `YES`.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var path: String? { get }
```
